title: About Me
text:
Hello I am Perry,
I am attending UNC Chapel Hill to obtain practical experience and a large skillset in the field of statistics and biostatistics and to apply the skills learned in research, personal projects, and data analysis opportunities.

My Resume

To view more information about my projects, please visit the Projects tab.
